title: Grudgematch - SEC vs The CEXs
relevance_summary: Regulatory action against major exchanges (Binance and Coinbase) for operating unregistered securities exchanges and offering unregistered securities.
summary: The SEC has charged Binance and Coinbase with operating unregistered securities exchanges and offering unregistered securities, potentially impacting various tokens. This regulatory action does not directly involve on-chain transactions but highlights the importance of compliance.
